author: Abhishek Kumbhar
name: Discriminative TTT + SLOT-24, 3-seed (8xH100 SXM)
blurb: Non-record near-frontier submission combining discriminative TTT (per-block adaptive LR, from PR #1351) with SLOT-24 (from PR #1376). 3-seed verified: seeds 1337/42/2025. Mean SLOT-24 BPB: 0.7093 ± 0.0025. Key finding: discriminative TTT improves pre-SLOT BPB by ~0.009, but SLOT saturates at ~0.71 regardless of base model quality — the ceiling is SLOT eval budget, not the base model.
